description: This file provides functions to interact with a notes API, including listing, creating, updating, pinning, and deleting notes. It encapsulates HTTP requests to the backend API endpoints related to note management.

methods.name: url(path)
methods.description: Constructs a full API URL, supporting empty base URL for same-origin setups.

methods.name: request(path, options = {})
methods.description: Performs a fetch request to the API with error handling and JSON response parsing.

methods.name: listNotes({ q, tag, tags, limit = 50, offset = 0 })
methods.description: Retrieves a list of notes with optional search and filter parameters.

methods.name: createNote({ title, content, tags })
methods.description: Creates a new note with a title, content, and optional tags.

methods.name: updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned })
methods.description: Updates an existing note identified by id with new data; can replace tags and update title, content, and pinned status.

methods.name: setNotePinned(id, pinned)
methods.description: Pins or unpins a note by its id.

methods.name: deleteNote(id)
methods.description: Deletes a note by its id.

ctags.name: createNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function createNote({ title, content, tags }) {$/

ctags.name: listNotes
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listNotes({ q, tag, tags, limit = 50, offset = 0 }) {$/

ctags.name: updateNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function updateNote(id, { title, content, tags, pinned }) {$/
